screens.name: Shared primary navigation
screens.purpose: Expose only the website routes that remain supported after Quiz and Chords are removed.
screens.primary_action: Open one of the remaining website sections.

ux_rules: Do not advertise routes that no longer exist.
Preserve the existing order, labels, active-state logic, keyboard behavior, and visual treatment of remaining links.
Use the normal Next.js not-found behavior for removed routes instead of adding replacement content or redirects.
Do not change unrelated page content, shared music utilities, or historical records.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: Keep the existing compact wrapped navigation while removing two obsolete destinations.
interaction_risks: Leaving a stale link would send users to a removed route.
Editing the navigation beyond the requested items could reorder or restyle unrelated destinations.
notes: Before browser evidence at .ai/runs/2026-07-23T16-47-54.798Z_remove-quiz-chords-pages/evidence/before-home.png shows both Chords and Quiz in the primary navigation.

constraints: Follow vercel:nextjs App Router file conventions: removing page.tsx removes the public route.
Delete the complete src/app/quiz and src/app/chords route-local implementations after confirming they have no external runtime importers.
Remove only the /quiz and /chords NAV_ITEMS entries.
Preserve remaining navigation order and active-state behavior.
Do not add redirects, replacement pages, dependencies, CSS rules, or visual styling changes.
Keep the product-craft-workbench register by leaving the existing navigation presentation unchanged.

critical_judgments: Quiz and Chords are absent from the rendered primary navigation.
The remaining navigation is complete, ordered as before, and fits the available pane width.
Direct requests to /quiz and /chords receive the normal not-found experience.
must_not_regress: Canvas, Voicings, Songs, and Score Lab links remain available.
Remaining navigation active states still work.
No unrelated visual or content change is introduced.

visual_constraints: No changes to typography, spacing, color, radius, borders, or responsive behavior.
Do not introduce redundant labels or replacement navigation items.
The reduced navigation must fit without avoidable horizontal overflow at representative desktop and mobile widths.
